assumption_text: No whole-Yemen civilian or military denominator is imported into urban Aden or Marib episodes.
rationale: National denominators would make the city episodes analytically meaningless.

assumption_text: The 256 disease deaths reported within the 858-civilian claim are excluded from the baseline direct-death estimate.
rationale: The project baseline is direct violent deaths only.

assumption_text: Partisan military kill claims in the Marib battle are preserved in claims.json but not promoted into core estimates.
rationale: They are too politically and methodologically unstable for core use without triangulation.
